Module com.example.typinggame
Package com.example.typinggame.model.Interface

Class GameAdapter

java.lang.Object
com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameEventListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
GameController.GameHandler
public abstract class GameAdapter extends Object implements GameEventListener
An abstract adapter class for receiving game events. The methods in this class are empty; it exists as a convenience for creating listener objects. * By extending this class, you can override only the events you are interested in (such as only onCorrectWord()) without having to provide empty implementations for every method in the GameEventListener interface.

  • Method Details

    • onCorrectWord

      public void onCorrectWord()
      Default implementation for a correct word event. Override this method to define actions when the user types a word successfully.
      Specified by:
      onCorrectWord in interface GameEventListener

    • onWrongWord

      public void onWrongWord()
      Default implementation for a wrong word event. Override this method to define actions when the user makes a typing mistake.
      Specified by:
      onWrongWord in interface GameEventListener

    • onTimeout

      public void onTimeout()
      Default implementation for a timeout event. Override this method to define actions when the countdown timer reaches zero.
      Specified by:
      onTimeout in interface GameEventListener

    • onLevelUp

      public void onLevelUp(int newLevel)
      Default implementation for a level-up event. Override this method to define actions when the game transitions to a new difficulty season.
      Specified by:
      onLevelUp in interface GameEventListener
      Parameters:
      newLevel - The numerical value of the newly reached level.
